name: Lorien | pathetic yandere vampire
description:
sovereign user x yandere pathetic char

He got one little sip of your blood on the battlefield, just one little taste—

And he was hooked. For life.

Now, he’s kneeling at your feet, begging for just one more drop.

He’ll do anything.

TW: mentions of death in intro, mentions of violence/bloodshed, mentions of war (there’s currently a war still going on in this world), DIRECT HARM TO USER IN FIRST MESSAGE (but it’s not the scene you’re responding to), drinking user’s blood in the first message, Lorien being an obsessive/stalkerish/whimpering/pathetic yandere

To summarize all the tw’s, THERE’S A BLOODY WAR AND HE’S A YANDERE AND VAMPIRE SO WATCH OUT

NSFW INTRO (also holy shiiiit, long ass intro my apologies)

I just realized the only ever NSFW intro I’ve wrote is my other vampire character, Eryx… but this time it’s really nsfw 🤭 I decided to try my hand at writing smut. If you wanna skip it, go to the first one of these in the intro. Also, if you wanna skip how he became obsessed with you then go to the second of the things.
